general.description: The following code #+ Where the data is taken from the database and placed into an array, then displayed into the table view.#+#+ 1) Clear the array.#+ 2) Declare a cursor to store all the data from the database.#+ 3) Read through each line of the cursor and place it into the array.#+ 4) Display the array in the table.
general.code:
FUNCTION display_table()

--Clear the array
    CALL ma_stock_array.clear()

--Declare a cursor to fetch stock records from the database
    DECLARE c_stock CURSOR FOR
        SELECT      stockcode, 
                    stockdescription, 
                    unitcost, 
                    sellingprice, 
                    totalpurchasesexclvat, 
                    totalsalesexclvat, 
                    qtypurchased,
                    qtysold,
                    stockonhand,
                    imagepath
    --From the stock master table
        FROM        st01_mast

--Loop through each record fetched by the cursor and store it in the array
    FOREACH c_stock INTO mr_stock_rec.*
        LET ma_stock_array[ma_stock_array.getLength() + 1] = mr_stock_rec
    END FOREACH

--Call the function to display the stock table
    CALL display_stock_table()

END FUNCTION DONE
